title: Termite Treatment Upper West Side | $800-$4,000 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional termite treatment in Upper West Side, Manhattan. Licensed exterminators serving brownstones & apartments. $800-$4,000. Same-day service available. Call now!
intro: Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive termite treatment services throughout the Upper West Side, protecting your property from costly structural damage. Our licensed technicians use advanced detection methods and EPA-approved treatments to eliminate termite colonies in brownstones, pre-war apartments, and historic buildings. With pricing ranging from $800 to $4,000 depending on infestation severity and property size, we offer transparent estimates and guaranteed results.
whyUs: Our team has over 15 years of experience treating termite infestations in Upper West Side's unique architectural landscape, from Riverside Drive co-ops to Central Park West landmarks. We understand the specific needs of older Manhattan buildings and use treatments that are safe for families, pets, and preserve the integrity of historic structures.
localContext: The Upper West Side's beautiful pre-war buildings, classic brownstones between Columbus Avenue and Riverside Park, and tree-lined streets create an ideal environment for termite activity. Properties near Riverside Park and those with original wooden features require regular termite inspections to protect against the subterranean and drywood termites common in this historic Manhattan neighborhood.

faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in the Upper West Side?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in the Upper West Side typically ranges from $800 to $4,000, depending on the size of your property, extent of infestation, and treatment method required. Smaller apartments may cost $800-$1,500, while larger brownstones or severe infestations can reach $3,000-$4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: What types of termites are common in Upper West Side buildings?
faqs.answer: The Upper West Side primarily sees subterranean termites, which enter buildings from the ground through foundation cracks, and occasionally drywood termites in wooden structures. Pre-war buildings with original wood flooring, window frames, and structural beams are particularly vulnerable. Our inspectors are trained to identify termite species and recommend the most effective treatment for your specific situation.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take in an Upper West Side apartment or brownstone?
faqs.answer: Most termite treatments in Upper West Side properties take 2-4 hours for initial application, though this varies by property size and treatment type. Liquid barrier treatments for brownstones may require a full day, while localized treatments for apartments are typically faster. Follow-up inspections are scheduled 30-90 days after treatment to ensure complete elimination, and most treatments come with warranties ranging from 1-5 years.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Upper West Side apartment during termite treatment?
faqs.answer: For most modern termite treatments, you can remain in your apartment, though we recommend staying out of treated areas for 2-4 hours until products dry. If fumigation is required (rare for apartments), temporary relocation for 24-72 hours may be necessary. We use low-toxicity, EPA-approved products safe for families and pets, and always provide specific instructions based on the treatment method used in your Upper West Side home.
